mxCell.value:
-  authRepository: AuthRepository
-  hashService: HashService
-  jwtService: JWTService
- otpService: OTPService
- emailService: EmailService

+ Login(request: LoginRequest): LoginResponse
+ OAuthLogin(request: OAuthLoginRequest): LoginResponse

+ Register(request: RegisterRequest): RegisterResponse
+ OAuthRegisterRequest(request: OAuthRegisterRequest): RegisterResponse

+ VerifyOTP(request: VerifyOTPRequest): LoginResponse
+ ResendOTP(userId: int, method: string): void

+ RequestPasswordReset(email: string): void
+ ResetPassword(token: string, newPasswordHash: string): bool

-userDao: UserDAO
- sessionDao: SessionDao
- oAuthLinkDao: OAuthLinkDAO
- passwordResetTokenDao: PasswordResetTokenDAO

+ FindUserByEmail(email: string): User 
+ CreateUser(user: User): bool 

+ FindOAuthLink(provider: string, providerUserId: string): OAuthLink 
+ CreateOAuthLink(link: OAuthLink): bool

+ CreateSession(userId: int, token: string, deviceInfo: string, browser: string, ip: string): Session
+ FindSessionByToken(token: string): Session 
+ SavePasswordResetToken(token: PasswordResetToken): void
+ FindPasswordResetToken(token: string): PasswordResetToken 

+ InvalidateAllSessions(userId: int): void

+ FindSessionsByUserId(userId: int): List<Session>
+ UpdateSessionToken(sessionId: int): bool
<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">UserDAO</font>

+ FindByEmail(email: string): User
+ FindById(id: int): User
+ Create(user: User): bool
+ Update(user: User): bool
+ UpdatePassword(int userId, string newPassword): bool
+ IncrementFailedAttempts(userId: int): void
+ ResetFailedAttempts(userId: int): void
+ LockAccount(userId: int, lockoutEnd: DateTime): void

+ Create(userId: int) : Session
+ FindByToken(token: string): Session
+ FindByUserId(userId: int): Live<Session>
+ Revoke(sessionId: int): void
+ RevokeAll(userId: int) : void

+ FindByProvider(provider: string, providerUserId: string): OAuthLink
+ FindByUserId(userId: string): List<OAuthLink>
+ Create(userId: int, provider: string, providerUserId: string): bool
+ Delete(id: int): void

+ Create(userId: int, tokenHash: string, expiresAt: DateTime): PasswordResetToken
+ FindByToken(tokenHash: string): PasswordResetToken
+ MarkAsUsed(tokenId: int): void
+ DeleteExpired(): void

+ Users: DbSet<User>
+ Session: DbSet<Session>
+ OAuthLinks: DbSet<OAuthLink>
+ PasswordResetTokens: DbSet<PasswordResetToken>
+ Accounts: DbSet<Account>
+ Cards: DbSet<Card>
+ Transaction: DbSet<Transaction>
+ Notifications: DbSet<Notification>

+ SaveChanges(): void
+ BeginTransaction(): void
+ CommitTransaction(): void
+ RollbackTransaction(): void
+ Dispose(): void

+ ExecuteQuery(sql: string): ResultSet
+ ExecuteNonQuery(sql: string): int

«interface»
IDbContext

+ BeginTransaction(): SqlTransaction
+ CommitTransaction(): void
+ RollbackTransaction(): void

+ ExecuteQuery(sql: string, params: object[]): ResultSet   -> return type subject to change
+ ExecuteNonQuery(sql: string params: object[]): int

+ Dispose(): void

«interface»
IUserDAO

+ findByEmail(email: string): User
+ findById(id: int): User
+ create(user: User): bool
+ update(user: User): bool
+ incrementFailedAttempts(userId: int): void
+ resetFailedAttempts(userId: int): void
+ lockAccounts(userId: int, lockoutEnd: DateTime): void

«interface»
ISessionDAO

+ create(userId: int) : Session
+ findByToken(token: string): Session
+ revoke(sessionId: int): void
+ revokeAll(userId: int) : void

«interface»
IOAuthLinkDAO

+ findByProvider( provider: string, providerUserId: string): OAuthLink
+ findByUserId( userId: string): List<OAuthLink>
+ create(userId: int, provider: string, providerUserId: string): bool
+ delete(id: int): void

«interface»
IPasswordResetTokenDAO

+ create(userId: int): PasswordResetToken
+ findByToken(token: string): PasswordResetToken
+ markAsUsed(tokenId: int): void
+ deleteExpired(): void

- id: int
- email: string
- passwordHash: string
- fullName: string
- phoneNumber: string
- dateOfBirth: DateTime
- address: string
- preferredLanguage: string
- is2FAEnabled: bool
- preferred2FAMethod: string
- isLocked: bool
- lockoutEnd: DateTime
- failedLoginAttempts: int
- createdAt: DateTime
- updatedAt: DateTime

+ enable2FA(2FAMethod: string): bool
+ disable2FA(2FAMethod: string): bool

- id: int
- userId: int
- token: string

- browser: string

- createdAt: DateTime

- value: T -> public getter
- observers: List<Observer<T>>

+ SetValue(value: T): T
+ AddObserver(observer: Observer<T>): void
+ RemoveObserver(observer: Observer<T>): void
+ NotifyObservers(): void
